overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a futuristic prison uniform exploring a medical facility. The character walks through dark industrial corridors into a surgery room, examines a deceased body on an operating table, interacts with a holographic wrist device, and collects evidence. The environment features sci-fi industrial architecture with dramatic red and teal lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial prison corridor with red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit industrial corridor toward the surgery entrance

entered.detail: metal panel walls with industrial rivets and dark green paint
glowing red emergency lighting fixtures along the ceiling
heavy metal airlock door with SURGERY sign above
metal floor grating with red painted lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor illuminated by red emergency lights. The metal walls and grated floor create a claustrophobic atmosphere as the character approaches a heavy airlock door marked SURGERY at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical surgery room entrance with teal curtains

events.description: entering the surgery room through the heavy airlock door
lighting shifts from red emergency to bright teal surgical lights

agents.ego_description: passing through the airlock door and pushing aside the teal curtains to enter the surgery room

entered.detail: hanging teal fabric curtains dividing the surgery entrance
large circular overhead surgical light fixture
medical operating table with equipment surrounding it
wall-mounted medical display screens showing vital signs

segments.scene_description: The character enters the surgery room through a heavy airlock, transitioning from the red-lit corridor to a brightly lit medical space with teal curtains. The environment shifts to a clean surgical theater with an operating table visible in the center and medical monitors on the walls.

events.description: pulling back the surgical sheet to reveal the deceased body
examining the victim's face and chest wounds closely

agents.ego_description: approaching the operating table and examining the deceased patient by pulling back the surgical sheet and inspecting the wounds

notable_agents.action: deceased male lying on operating table with severe blood loss and facial injuries

entered.detail: bright circular surgical lamp illuminating the operating table
metal IV drip stand with medical bags

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the operating table in the center of the surgery room and pulls back the green surgical sheet to reveal a deceased male with severe blood loss and facial injuries. The character leans in to examine the wounds closely under the bright surgical light.

events.description: activating the wrist-mounted TERRA device to view a holographic video message
closing the deceased's eyes and retrieving the identification card

agents.ego_description: reviewing a holographic video message on the wrist device, then respectfully closing the victim's eyes and collecting the ID card as evidence

notable_agents.action: deceased prison inmate with bloodied face and uniform, eyes closed by ego

entered.detail: holographic display projecting from the character's wrist device showing a video call
identification card taken from the deceased's hand

segments.scene_description: The character activates a wrist-mounted device displaying a holographic video message. After reviewing the message, the character closes the deceased's eyes and retrieves an identification card from the body, then stands up to depart.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, red-lit industrial corridor into a sterile, brightly lit surgical theater. It begins with the character navigating a narrow hallway of metal walls and grated floors, moving steadily toward a heavy airlock door marked SURGERY. As the character passes through the airlock, the oppressive red emergency lighting shifts abruptly to a clean medical space defined by teal curtains and glowing monitors. The camera then follows the character to the center of the room, where they pull back a green surgical sheet to closely examine a deceased male under the harsh glare of surgical lights. Finally, the scene concludes as the character activates a holographic wrist device to review a message before closing the body's eyes and retrieving an identification card.
